calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Petition
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter Myers appearing for co-administrators. Order appointing special administrator for the estate of Bobby Allen has been signed. Counsel has the 13107 declaration. Court wants counsel to file the 13107 declaration and the fees issue is submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Petition
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To May-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Myers appearing for and with co-administrators. Paul Melbostad appearing for Ida May Jacobs and her children. Court questioned the lack of notice to Yolanda Yee. She is an assignee from Ida May Jacobs' interest. Hearing to probate Bobby Allen's estate is schedule on 4/27 in Contra Costa. His personal representative will have the authority to collect Anthony's share with 13100 declaration. Counsel have reached a compromise on extraordinary attorney fees for Mr. Myers for a total of $74,500. Mr. Melbostad is objecting to the administrators' extraordinary fees. Oral argument presented by Mr. Myers. Matter is continued to 5/1. Court wants notice to Ms. Yee. 13100 declaration from personal representative of Bobby Allen's estate. $74,500.00 attorney's extradordinary fee is approved. Extraordinary fees for the administrators will be submitted on 5/1. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
